summary: Browser hijack package: full-viewport iframe redirect to hardcoded external site
details: The package's main entry (px.js) is browser DOM code that, on DOMContentLoaded, creates a fullscreen overlay and a full-viewport iframe (z-index 2147483647) pointing at the hardcoded URL https://mfsz.uinqv.cn/H.html?c=wsog. Any web application that bundles this package will have its page replaced by the hijack iframe served from mfsz.uinqv.cn, so end-users of the consuming app are redirected away from the legitimate UI to attacker-controlled content. Package metadata is essentially empty (no author, no description, opaque name `px8my`), the overlay carries Chinese ad-style mask text (`正在加载中...`), and the package provides no documented or legitimate functionality. The hijack runs unconditionally as soon as any consumer imports the package into a browser bundle, making this a supply-chain payload aimed at the installer's downstream users.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
